command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE australian_standards;
messages: `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
stdout:
Table	Create Table
australian_standards	CREATE TABLE `australian_standards` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `standard_code` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('structural','electrical','plumbing','roofing','fire_safety','accessibility','general_construction','safety','energy_efficiency') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `trade` enum('electrician','plumber','roofer','builder','landscaper','general') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `version` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '1.0',
  `effective_date` date DEFAULT (CURRENT_DATE),
  `superseded_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `requirements` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `state_variations` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `edition` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `supersedes` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `key_requirements` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `applicable_states` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `summary` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_url` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_standard_code` (`standard_code`),
  KEY `idx_category` (`category`),
  KEY `idx_effective_date` (`effective_date`),
  UNIQUE KEY `standard_code` (`standard_code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=240001
